notes: Frontend + static-pipeline + tooling task. FQNs are vitest test files (path#scenario) or harness/pipeline scripts; the backend ArchUnit method-naming rule is N/A. Live-only budget rows are mode green-only (verified by the R8 harness, not a red-first unit test) and declared here explicitly.

rows.drives: selftest.mjs(current build) -> metrics within tolerance of baselines.json
rows.given: the committed harness and baselines.json (archived §1/§1b/§1c numbers), run against the current pre-remediation build
rows.when: selftest.mjs executes the sweep + profile against a local preview

rows.drives: frontend/package.json -> no lighthouse/playwright dependency
rows.given: the harness lives in scripts/perf with its own package.json
rows.when: the FE dependency graph is inspected

rows.drives: eager-gate.mjs(dist) -> exit 0
rows.given: the built dist/index.html entry + modulepreload chunks
rows.when: eager-gate maps each chunk to its sourcemap sources and sums gzip

rows.drives: shared/* -> no import of @/pages/*
rows.given: the shared layer after the sse/userSettings moves

rows.drives: useAppSse() -> single app-wide SSE subscription, events validated by PlannerSseEventSchema
rows.given: an authenticated session
rows.when: the app mounts and useAppSse runs at its new @/shared/sse path

rows.drives: SyncChoiceDialog (lazy) -> opens for first-login users when the store flag is set
rows.given: a first-login user with the useFirstLoginStore flag set
rows.when: the lazy dialog resolves and mounts

rows.drives: useUserSettingsQuery() -> non-blocking settings fetch for authed users
rows.given: an authenticated session at app load
rows.when: the query runs at its new @/shared/userSettings path

rows.drives: gesellschaft-detail loader -> blocks nav on prefetch, caches under publishedPlannerQueryKeys.detail(id) staleTime 5min, yields loaderData.title
rows.given: navigation to /planner/md/gesellschaft/$id with the loader using dynamic import(fetchPublishedPlanner)

rows.drives: globals.css -> imports pretendard-subset.css, no hand-written full Pretendard @font-face
rows.given: the globals.css stylesheet

rows.drives: frontend/src/assets/fonts/** -> byte-identical before/after
rows.given: the task diff
rows.when: assets/fonts is compared against its base-commit state

rows.drives: thumbnail step -> a webp thumb per grid-consumed art id, each >= 2x its consuming grid's largest slot
rows.given: the grid art dirs images/{ego,identity,abEvent,themePack}

rows.drives: shared/assets thumb accessor -> resolves the thumb variant path for grid art, original for detail
rows.given: a grid-consumed art id

rows.drives: grid card render -> src from the thumb accessor, not the original-art helper
rows.given: a grid card in a browse grid

rows.drives: AbEventCard render -> img[loading=lazy][decoding=async]
rows.given: an AbEventCard

rows.drives: ThemePackCard render -> img[loading=lazy][decoding=async]
rows.given: a ThemePackCard

rows.drives: home async section fallback -> shaped skeleton with fixed min-height, not LoadingState
rows.given: a home data section in its loading state

rows.drives: read-only note display -> renders converted HTML without mounting the tiptap editor
rows.given: a plan viewer displaying a note read-only

rows.drives: router config -> defaultPreload === 'intent'
rows.given: the router instance

rows.drives: plan detail render -> header from loader data in first commit; deck/floors/notes behind deferred skeletons
rows.given: a plan detail route mount

rows.drives: PlannerGridSkeleton() -> cardCount derived from PLANNER_LIST.PAGE_SIZE, not hardcoded 8
rows.given: the planner grid skeleton
rows.when: it renders its default card count

rows.drives: Deck Builder Suspense fallback -> tile dimensions from CARD_GRID constants, not w-16 h-20
rows.given: the deck builder section in its loading state

rows.drives: planner card height -> constant and rendered card consume one source (CARD_GRID.HEIGHT)
rows.given: CARD_PRESETS.planner.height and the rendered PlannerCard

rows.drives: sweep.mjs(post-remediation build) -> mobile budgets
rows.given: a full build with all remediation phases landed, served with live data

rows.drives: profile.mjs(post-remediation) -> plan-route content p50 below the §1b baseline
rows.given: a post-remediation build

decisions.text: Shell-consumed modules move to @/shared/sse + @/shared/userSettings; components/ must not import pages/*
S-Core Dream + KOTRA font binaries untouchable; only CSS references change
Static pipeline emits thumbnails before any frontend consumption
Skeleton fidelity is a contract: placeholders reserve geometry from the same constants/counts as content
Heavy measurement tooling keeps its deps out of the app build graph (scripts/perf/package.json)
decisions.enforcement: scripts/perf/lib/font-diff style grep gate on frontend/package.json

spikes.cmd-sketch: in scripts/perf: yarn add lighthouse @playwright/test; CHROME_PATH=/usr/bin/chromium run one sweep + one CDP-throttled nav against a running preview
spikes.kills: the whole harness if chromium/CDP/headless is unavailable in the build env

spikes.cmd-sketch: resize one webp to a thumb via the static pipeline's image lib (PIL/Pillow); assert output dimensions >= 2x slot
spikes.kills: the thumbnail step if no usable resize lib exists in the static toolchain

spikes.cmd-sketch: build with VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4173; extend CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS to include :4173; start preview + backend; curl a published id through the proxy
spikes.kills: live budget verification if the backend+CORS+preview stack cannot be brought up

02.validation: yarn --cwd frontend vitest run src/shared/sse src/shared/userSettings src/lib

04.validation: yarn --cwd frontend vitest run src/shared/assets src/pages/ego

05.validation: yarn --cwd frontend vitest run src/pages/abEvent src/pages/themePack

06.validation: yarn --cwd frontend vitest run src/pages/home src/components/feedback

08.validation: yarn --cwd frontend vitest run src/lib src/pages/planner src/components/feedback

09.validation: node scripts/perf/sweep.mjs && node scripts/perf/profile.mjs && node scripts/perf/geometry.mjs
